NOTICE OF MOTION TO CORRECT MISTAKE IN MEMORANDUM OF COSTS, MEMORANDUM OF POINTS & AUTHORITIES (TRANSACTION ID # 100056333) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SACOR FINANCIAL, INC. HEARING SET FOR JAN-14-2019 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ORDER DENYING MOTION TO CORRECT MISTAKE IN MEMORANDUM OF COSTS.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SACOR FINANCIAL, INC.'S MOTION TO CORRECT MISTAKE IN MEMORANDUM OF COSTS. AUTHORITIES. ASSIGNEE OF RECORD SACCOR FINANCIAL, INC.'S MOTION TO CORRECT MISTAKE IN MEMORANDUM OF COSTS IS DENIED. CCP 473(B) WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE MOTION BE MADE WITHIN SIX MONTHS, NOT CCP 473(A) WHICH DOES NOT CARRY A TIME LIMIT, IS THE APPLICABLE CODE SECTION PERMITTING RELIEF FOR A PARTY FROM ITS OWN MISTAKE. SINCE THIS MOTION WAS FILED MORE THAN SIX MONTHS AFTER THE ASSERTED MISTAKE, THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Correct Mistake In Memorandum Of Costs, Memorandum Of Points & Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Gokoffski, Esq. 415-827-1828 for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SACOR FINANCIAL, INC.'s Motion To Correct Mistake In Memorandum Of Costs. Authorities.

Assignee of record Saccor Financial, Inc.'s motion to correct mistake in memorandum of costs is denied. CCP 473(b) which requires that the motion be made within six months, not CCP 473(a) which does not carry a time limit, is the applicable code section permitting relief for a party from its own mistake. Since this motion was filed more than six months after the asserted mistake, the motion is untimely.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
